---
title: "Syllabus and Course Policies"
---

*Quarter:* {{< var quarter >}}

## Course Information

| | |
|---|---|
| **Schedule** | _TBD — meeting days, times, room_ |
| **Instructor** | {{< var instructor >}} <{{< var instructor_email >}}> |
| **Office Hours** | _TBD_ |
| **Textbook** | _TBD_ |
| **Prerequisites** | _TBD_ |

## Course Catalog Description

_TBD_

## Grading

| Assignment | How many | Weight |
|---|---|---|
| Reading Quizzes | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| Homework | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| Exams | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| Labs | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |

_Notes on quiz / homework / exam grading rules — TBD._

## Late Work

_TBD_

## Collaboration and Generative AI

_TBD — Reasonable / Not Reasonable table goes here._

## NPS Honor Code

_TBD_
